nameEn: Mosque and Shrine of Sayyida Nafisa
whyCandidateMatters: Mosque and Shrine of Sayyida Nafisa would broaden the project beyond the current 41-record set and improve district, type, or period coverage. Coverage value: this record would expand the multi-period layer in al-Khalifa through a active shrine and mosque rather than duplicating an existing published monument.
knownResearchGaps: Confirm a direct monument-specific institutional or academic source.
Validate current identity, coordinates, and survival condition.
Verify a reusable documentary image and its exact license.
